nodes.name: spec-miner.md
nodes.summary: Defines the Spec Miner agent, a multi-phase subagent that crawls a codebase to extract structured specifications by discovering entry points, performing deep per-module dives with call-chain expansion, and generating canonical spec output with invariants and requirements.
nodes.languageNotes: Three-phase process (Scope Discovery, Per-Module Deep Dive, Spec Generation) with token budget strategy and integration hooks for other agents.

nodes.name: swift-build-resolver.md
nodes.summary: Defines the Swift Build Error Resolver agent, a specialized subagent that diagnoses and resolves Swift compilation failures across SPM, Xcode, and toolchain environments using a structured diagnostic-then-fix workflow.
nodes.languageNotes: Covers SPM, Xcode, and Swift version/toolchain troubleshooting paths as distinct sections with stop conditions for escalation.

nodes.name: swift-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: Defines the Swift code reviewer agent, a subagent that evaluates Swift pull requests against prioritized criteria covering safety, error handling, concurrency, memory management, and protocol-oriented design, issuing pass/fail approval decisions.

nodes.name: tdd-guide.md
nodes.summary: Defines the TDD Guide agent, which drives a strict red-green-refactor test-driven development cycle, enforcing test-first ordering, coverage verification, and anti-pattern avoidance, with an eval-driven addendum for v1.8.

nodes.name: type-design-analyzer.md
nodes.summary: Defines the Type Design Analyzer agent, a focused subagent that evaluates type definitions against four criteria — encapsulation, invariant expression, invariant usefulness, and enforcement — and produces a structured analysis report.

nodes.name: typescript-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: Defines the TypeScript code reviewer agent, a subagent that reviews TypeScript/Node.js code against prioritized security, type-safety, async correctness, error handling, and idiomatic patterns criteria, with optional React/Next.js coverage.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes a Reference section linking to upstream TypeScript and Node.js style guides; has a scope-sharing relationship with vue-reviewer.

nodes.name: vue-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: Defines the Vue.js code reviewer agent, a subagent that handles Vue-specific review concerns (reactivity, composables, Router, Pinia, SSR/Nuxt) and explicitly delegates TypeScript-layer issues to the typescript-reviewer agent to avoid duplication.
nodes.languageNotes: Explicitly scoped against typescript-reviewer — Vue-only concerns here; includes a Related section cross-referencing typescript-reviewer and a Scope section clarifying the boundary.
